title: How a Private Chef Startup Went All In on AI Agents
summary: Yhangry is a private chef marketplace doing $15 million in GMV that's going all in on AI agents across every function of the company — from an autonomous bug fixer that shipped 25 fixes in its first week to an AI product that matches chefs and customers instantly. In this recent batch talk, founder Siddhi Mittal walks through three real business use cases for agents at yhangry, how she turned teaching AI in plain English into a growth channel worth $50K in free conference slots, and the hard org
